allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "killed PID $_" } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "nothing on 3000" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "nothing on 3000" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "stopped PID $_" } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "nothing on 3000" })
Bash(git -c user.name="Kevin Tan" -c user.email="kvnt20@gmail.com" commit -m "Initial commit: Reimbursement Toolkit PWA")
